CustomObject.label: NEPA Detected Protection Layer
CustomObject.description: One record per detected federal protection layer per GIS proximity run. Replaces the unstructured nepa_protection_areas__c text summary with queryable records. Used by NEPA_Team_Assembly_Orchestrator to assemble specialist teams and create field-survey Work Orders. Add new NEPA_Layer_Discipline__mdt records to route new layers to disciplines without modifying flows.
